title: epidendrum ingramii
intro: Epidendrum ingramii, also known as the Ingram's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum ingramii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum ingramii typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be infused in hot water or used in teas to harness its medicinal properties.
